questions.question: Rohan is feeling stressed about his UPSC prep. How can Ira warmly and accurately remind him of his own words to boost his morale?
questions.ground_truth: She should gently remind him of his own inspiration note: 'Raste thode tough hai, lekin manzil bahut khoobsurat hai,' validating his struggle while pointing to his goal.

questions.question: When Rohan feels overwhelmed by work, what specific daily habit should Ira warmly encourage him to maintain based on their past sessions?
questions.ground_truth: She should empathetically suggest he continue his gratitude journal and take deep breaths, as she advised on June 18.

questions.question: If Rohan is feeling down, which specific childhood memory involving his father could Ira warmly bring up to bring a smile to his face?
questions.ground_truth: She could fondly remind him of the joyful memory of learning to ride a bicycle with his papa for the first time.
